medicalDisclaimer.body: This AI-powered oral health screening tool provides automated analysis based on image recognition and machine learning. It is intended for informational purposes only and does not replace professional medical diagnosis, treatment, or advice. Always consult a qualified healthcare professional regarding any medical concerns.

landing.description: Screen for oral cancer risk in seconds using our advanced AI technology. Fast, private, and designed to help you take control of your health.
landing.featuresDescription: Combining cutting-edge AI technology with medical expertise to provide reliable early detection screening.

features.analysisDescription: Advanced machine learning algorithms trained on thousands of clinical images for accurate early detection.
features.resultsDescription: Get your risk assessment within moments. No waiting, no appointments needed for initial screening.
features.guidanceDescription: Receive personalized recommendations and connect with healthcare professionals when needed.

landing.stepsDescription: Get your oral health screening in just a few minutes.

steps.photoDescription: Capture a clear image of your oral cavity
steps.analysisDescription: Our AI examines the image for indicators
steps.resultsDescription: Receive your risk assessment and guidance

testimonials.oneQuote: This tool has become an invaluable part of our preliminary screening process. The accuracy is remarkable.
testimonials.twoQuote: Early detection is crucial for oral cancer outcomes. This AI system helps identify cases we might otherwise miss.
testimonials.threeQuote: The ease of use and quick results make it accessible for patients who might otherwise delay screening.

faq.a1: No. This tool provides a risk assessment only and should not replace professional medical advice.
faq.q2: How accurate is the AI analysis?
faq.a2: Our AI is trained on thousands of clinical images and provides high accuracy for early screening.
faq.a3: All uploaded images are encrypted and processed securely.
faq.q4: Do I need to create an account?
faq.a4: No registration is required to perform a scan.

landing.ctaTitle: Take Control of Your Oral Health Today
landing.ctaDescription: Early detection can make all the difference. Start your free screening now and get peace of mind in minutes.
landing.ctaFootnote: No registration required â€¢ Results in seconds â€¢ 100% private

about.heroDescription: We're on a mission to make oral cancer screening accessible to everyone. By combining cutting-edge AI with medical expertise, we're empowering people to take control of their health.
about.paragraph1: Oral cancer affects thousands of people every year. When detected early, survival rates improve dramatically. Yet many cases are still discovered late because regular screening is not always accessible.
about.paragraph2: We believe everyone deserves access to early detection tools, regardless of location, income, or access to routine care. Our AI-powered screening platform helps bridge that gap with fast risk assessment from home.
about.paragraph3: Our technology does not replace professional care. It supports earlier action by helping people notice possible concerns before they become harder to treat.

values.patientDescription: Every decision we make prioritizes the health and well-being of our users.
values.accuracyDescription: Our AI is rigorously validated against expert diagnoses to ensure reliability.
values.privacyDescription: Your health data is protected with enterprise-grade security and encryption.
values.accessDescription: Making early detection available to everyone, regardless of location or resources.

about.privacyDescription: We take your privacy seriously. Here's how we protect your information.

privacyFeatures.noStorageDescription: Images are processed in real time and deleted right after analysis. We do not keep your photos.
privacyFeatures.encryptionDescription: All data transmission is encrypted using industry-standard secure protocols.
privacyFeatures.anonymousDescription: No personal identifiers are attached to your scans during processing.
privacyFeatures.deleteDescription: You can request deletion of your data at any time.

about.teamDescription: Our team combines experience in medicine, AI research, and healthcare technology.
about.partnersDescription: Collaborating with leading medical institutions worldwide
about.ctaTitle: Join Us in the Fight Against Oral Cancer
about.ctaDescription: Take the first step toward better oral health. Get your free screening today.

awareness.heroDescription: Knowledge is your first line of defense. Learn about the signs, risk factors, and prevention strategies for oral cancer.

stats.cases: New cases annually in the US

awareness.symptomsDescription: Early detection significantly improves treatment outcomes. Be aware of these common symptoms.

symptoms.soresDescription: Mouth sores that do not heal within 2-3 weeks
symptoms.patchesDescription: Unusual white or red patches on the gums, tongue, or mouth lining
symptoms.lumpsDescription: Unexplained lumps, bumps, or thickening of tissue in the mouth or neck
symptoms.swallowingDescription: Persistent difficulty or pain when swallowing, chewing, or moving the jaw
symptoms.numbnessDescription: Numbness or loss of feeling in the mouth, lips, or face
symptoms.voiceDescription: Persistent hoarseness or changes in voice quality

awareness.importantDescription: If you experience any of these symptoms for more than 2-3 weeks, consult a healthcare professional immediately. Early detection is crucial for successful treatment.
awareness.riskDescription: Understanding your risk factors can help you make informed decisions about your health.

riskFactors.tobaccoDescription: Smoking and smokeless tobacco significantly increase risk
riskFactors.alcoholDescription: Heavy alcohol use, especially combined with tobacco
riskFactors.hpvDescription: Human papillomavirus linked to oropharyngeal cancers
riskFactors.sunDescription: Excessive sun exposure increases lip cancer risk

awareness.preventionDescription: Many oral cancers can be prevented through lifestyle changes and regular screenings.

preventionTips.quitDescription: Stop smoking and avoid all tobacco products
preventionTips.limitDescription: Reduce alcohol consumption or avoid it altogether
preventionTips.dietDescription: Eat plenty of fruits and vegetables rich in antioxidants
preventionTips.sunDescription: Use lip balm with SPF and limit long sun exposure
preventionTips.hygieneDescription: Maintain good oral hygiene and regular dental care
preventionTips.screeningsDescription: Get routine dental check-ups and oral cancer screening

awareness.doctorDescription: Don't wait if you notice any concerning symptoms. Early consultation can make a significant difference.

doctorList.one: Any mouth sore that doesn't heal within 2-3 weeks
doctorList.three: Difficulty swallowing or a persistent sore throat
doctorList.four: A lump or thickening in the cheek or neck
doctorList.five: Numbness in the tongue or other areas of the mouth
doctorList.six: White or red patches on the gums, tongue, or mouth lining

contact.heroDescription: Have questions about our AI screening technology or need help connecting with a healthcare professional? We're here to help.
contact.sentDescription: Thank you for reaching out. We'll get back to you within 24-48 hours.
contact.name: Full Name *
contact.subject: Subject
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us more about your inquiry...
contact.careDescription: Need to speak with a healthcare professional? Send us a message and we will help you find the right specialist.
contact.emergencyDescription: If you're experiencing a medical emergency, please call emergency services immediately.

values.address: 123 Medical Center Dr, San Francisco, CA 94102

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.

symptomsPage.heroDescription: Early detection saves lives. Knowing the signs and symptoms is the first step toward prevention and timely treatment.
symptomsPage.riskDescription: While anyone can develop oral cancer, certain behaviors and factors can significantly increase your risk.
symptomsPage.adviceTitle: When should you see a doctor?
symptomsPage.adviceDescription: If you notice any of these symptoms lasting more than 2 weeks, don't wait. Early stage oral cancer is highly treatable.

adviceList.jaw: Difficulty moving your jaw or tongue

symptomsPage.checkupsDescription: Regular dental visits are your best defense. Dentists are trained to spot early signs of oral cancer during routine exams.

symptoms.ulcersDescription: Ulcers that do not heal within 2-3 weeks are one of the most common early signs.
symptoms.patchesDescription: Velvety white or red patches inside the mouth can be warning signs.
symptoms.lumpsDescription: Thickening, lumps, or rough spots on the lips, gums, or inside the mouth.
symptoms.swallowingDescription: Feeling like something is stuck in your throat or pain when swallowing.
symptoms.throatDescription: A chronic sore throat or hoarseness that doesn't go away.
symptoms.painDescription: Unexplained numbness, loss of feeling, or pain in any part of the face or mouth.
symptoms.teethDescription: Teeth becoming loose without a clear reason or dentures no longer fitting well.
symptoms.earDescription: Pain in the ear without hearing loss.

riskFactors.tobaccoDescription: Smoking or chewing tobacco is the number one risk factor.
riskFactors.alcoholDescription: Heavy alcohol consumption increases the risk significantly.
riskFactors.hpvDescription: Human papillomavirus is a growing cause of oral cancers.
riskFactors.sunDescription: Excessive sun exposure is a major risk factor for lip cancer.
